componentDescription: A UI control for navigating through content divided into multiple pages.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages available for navigation.

onPageChange.description: Callback function invoked when the current page changes.

pageSize.description: The number of items to display per page. Optional.

pageSizeOptions.description: An array of available page size options for the selector. Optional.

onPageSizeChange.description: Callback function invoked when the page size changes. Optional.

showPageSizeSelector.description: Determines whether to display the page size selector. Optional.

showPageInfo.description: Determines whether to display information about the current page and total pages. Optional.

maxPageButtons.description: The maximum number of page buttons to display in the pagination control. Optional.

showFirstLastButtons.description: Determines whether to display buttons to navigate to the first and last pages. Optional.

size.description: Defines the size of the pagination component (e.g., small, medium, large). Optional.

variant.description: Defines the visual variant of the pagination component (e.g., outlined, contained). Optional.

shape.description: Defines the shape of the pagination buttons (e.g., rounded, square). Optional.

typeValues: object with properties: container?: ViewProps, pageButton?: ViewProps, activePageButton?: ViewProps, navigationButton?: ViewProps, pageInfo?: ViewProps, pageSizeSelector?: ViewProps, ellipsis?: ViewProps
views.description: Custom styling options for the pagination component. Optional.
